data.title: Petco Launches $650 Million Senior Secured Notes Offering
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Petco Health and Wellness Company ( (WOOF) ) has provided an announcement.

On January 21, 2026, Petco announced it had commenced an offering of $650 million in senior secured notes due 2031, guaranteed by subsidiaries that back its credit facilities and secured by first-lien interests on fixed assets and second-lien interests on current assets. The company plans to use the proceeds, together with borrowings under a new term loan and cash on hand, to fully repay its existing term loan facility, cover related fees and expenses, and fund general corporate purposes, a move that is set to reshape its debt profile by replacing existing financing with a new mix of secured notes and loan funding aimed at strengthening its capital structure and financial flexibility for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (WOOF) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Petco Health and Wellness Company stock, see the WOOF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WOOF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WOOF is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial performance—ongoing profitability and revenue pressure offset by improving leverage and strong free cash flow trends. Technicals remain neutral-to-bearish (below major moving averages and negative MACD), and valuation is penalized by a negative P/E and no dividend yield. Offsetting these, the latest earnings call and refinancing actions indicate improving profitability/cash generation and better balance-sheet risk management.

To see Spark’s full report on WOOF stock, click here.

More about Petco Health and Wellness Company

Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc., traded on Nasdaq as WOOF, operates in the pet care retail and services industry, offering a broad assortment of pet food, supplies, and accessories alongside veterinary and other pet services. The company serves pet owners through more than 1,500 stores across the U.S., Mexico and Puerto Rico, as well as via its e-commerce site and mobile app, and also supports animal welfare through its Petco Love foundation and in-store adoption events.

Average Trading Volume: 2,529,589

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Kindly MD Rebrands as Nakamoto Inc., Embracing Bitcoin Focus
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kindly MD ( (NAKA) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 16, 2026, Kindly MD, Inc. filed an amendment to its Delaware Certificate of Incorporation to change its corporate name to Nakamoto Inc. and relocate its registered address from Salt Lake City, Utah, to Nashville, Tennessee, with both the name change and amended and restated bylaws becoming effective on January 21, 2026. The rebranding aligns the company’s corporate identity with its shift to a Bitcoin-native operating strategy, under which it has already accumulated a Bitcoin treasury exceeding $500 million and deployed capital into strategic investments and treasury assets in multiple international markets. The company’s common stock and tradeable warrants will continue to trade under the existing NAKA and NAKAW ticker symbols, respectively, its corporate website has moved to nakamoto.com, and no action is required from shareholders as a result of the change, while the legacy healthcare business continues to operate under the subsidiary Kindly LLC.

The most recent analyst rating on (NAKA) stock is a Buy with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kindly MD stock, see the NAKA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NAKA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NAKA is a Underperform.

The overall stock score of 38 reflects significant financial and technical challenges. The company’s financial performance is weak, with declining revenues and profitability issues. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, and valuation metrics are unattractive due to negative earnings. These factors collectively contribute to a low stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on NAKA stock, click here.

More about Kindly MD

Nakamoto Inc., formerly Kindly MD, Inc., is a Bitcoin-focused company building a global portfolio of Bitcoin-native businesses. Through disciplined accumulation of Bitcoin holdings and the use of its treasury, it seeks to acquire and develop companies across finance, media, advisory and related sectors, aiming to provide commercial and financial infrastructure for next-generation capital markets. The Company’s healthcare operations continue under Kindly LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary.

data.title: Rio Tinto Posts Strong Q4 2025 Output With Record Pilbara and Copper Growth, Confirms 2026 Guidance
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Rio Tinto Limited ( (AU:RIO) ) is now available.

On 21 January 2026, Rio Tinto reported its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 production results, highlighting an 8% year-on-year increase in copper-equivalent output and a 5% rise in shipments, driven by record bauxite production, expanding lithium operations and strong copper growth from the fully ramped Oyu Tolgoi underground mine. The group posted record quarterly iron ore production and shipments in the Pilbara after recovering from earlier weather disruptions, marked first shipments from its Simandou project, and delivered solid aluminium performance, while reiterating unchanged 2026 production guidance and noting reduced exploration and evaluation expense as spending on the Rincon lithium project was capitalised. Management framed the results as evidence that its ‘stronger, sharper, simpler’ operating model and portfolio of growth projects are improving operational excellence and reinforcing Rio Tinto’s competitive position in key commodities, even as it pauses guidance for some smaller product lines amid ongoing strategic reviews and navigates mixed market conditions across iron ore, copper, aluminium, lithium and titanium dioxide.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RIO) stock is a Buy with a A$169.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rio Tinto Limited stock, see the AU:RIO Stock Forecast page.

More about Rio Tinto Limited

Rio Tinto Limited, part of the Rio Tinto Group, is a global mining and metals company with core operations in iron ore, copper, aluminium, bauxite, titanium dioxide, borates and a growing lithium portfolio. Its assets span major iron ore hubs such as the Pilbara in Western Australia and emerging growth projects like Simandou in Guinea, alongside significant copper operations including Oyu Tolgoi in Mongolia and aluminium operations in Australia and elsewhere, positioning the group as a key supplier to steelmaking, energy transition metals and industrial materials markets worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 1,238,484

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$214.4B

data.title: Jeffs’ Brands Raises $2.4 Million and Expands KeepZone AI Defense Reach in North America
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd. ( (JFBR) ) has provided an update.

On January 21, 2026, Jeffs’ Brands Ltd. entered into a securities purchase agreement with institutional investors for a registered direct offering of 4,007,125 ordinary shares at $0.60 per share, targeting gross proceeds of about $2.4 million before expenses, with closing expected around January 22, 2026. The capital raise, to be used for working capital and general corporate purposes, was executed under an existing shelf registration and includes a 9.99% beneficial ownership cap per investor; the deal received audit committee and board approval under Israeli law due to the CEO’s directorship in one of the purchasing entities, underscoring governance scrutiny around the transaction. In parallel, the company announced that its subsidiary KeepZone AI Inc. has signed a non-exclusive reseller agreement with Israeli multi-sensor specialist Beesense Sensors Systems Ltd., appointing KeepZone to promote, sell and support Beesense’s Firefly, Mantis and BEE ISR product families in Canada and Mexico. This reseller agreement broadens Jeffs’ Brands’ footprint in the North American defense and security markets and aligns with its strategic shift toward AI-enabled homeland security solutions, potentially enhancing its competitive positioning beyond its legacy Amazon-focused e-commerce operations.

More about Jeffs’ Brands Ltd.

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd. is a data-driven e-commerce company listed on Nasdaq that originally built its business on the Amazon Marketplace and has recently pivoted into the global homeland security sector through its wholly owned subsidiary, KeepZone AI Inc. Following a December 2025 distribution agreement with Scanary Ltd., the company now aims to deliver comprehensive, multi-layered security ecosystems for critical infrastructure worldwide, leveraging advanced AI-driven solutions and its data-centric operating expertise to capture growth in the expanding homeland security market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $4.09M

data.title: Currenc Group Discloses Nasdaq Deficiency Notice Over Delayed Annual Meeting
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Currenc Group ( (CURR) ) has issued an update.

In a filing dated January 21, 2026, Currenc Group Inc. disclosed that it received a Nasdaq deficiency notification on January 12, 2026 for failing to hold an annual meeting of shareholders within 12 months of its fiscal year-end, putting the company out of compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rules 5620(a) and 5810(c)(2)(G) and related guidance. The company, which publicly reported the notice on January 13, 2026, said the deficiency has no immediate effect on the listing or trading of its shares and has 45 calendar days from January 12 to submit a compliance plan; it is currently consulting with Nasdaq on whether its shareholder meeting scheduled for February 25, 2026 will be sufficient to restore compliance, with the possibility of an extension of up to 180 days from fiscal year-end if Nasdaq accepts its plan.

The most recent analyst rating on (CURR) stock is a Sell with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Currenc Group stock, see the CURR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CURR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CURR is a Underperform.

Currenc Group’s overall stock score is heavily impacted by its poor financial performance, which is the most significant factor. The company’s financial instability, as reflected in its income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow, is a major concern. Technical analysis also indicates a bearish trend, and valuation metrics highlight the lack of profitability. These factors combine to result in a low overall stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on CURR stock, click here.

More about Currenc Group

Currenc Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR) is a Singapore-based fintech company that provides artificial intelligence solutions to financial institutions worldwide. Its offerings include the SEAMLESS AI Call Centre and other AI-powered agents aimed at reducing costs, improving efficiency and enhancing customer satisfaction for banks, insurers, telecom operators, government agencies and other financial players. The company also operates a digital remittance platform that enables e-wallets, remittance firms and corporates to deliver real-time, 24/7 cross-border payment services, with a focus on expanding financial access in underserved communities.

On January 20, 2026, Five9’s board approved an Amended and Restated Employment Transition Agreement that formalizes the succession from current CEO Michael Burkland to incoming CEO Amit Mathradas, who is set to take over effective February 2, 2026. data.title: Health Discovery Sues NVIDIA Over Expired AI Patent
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Health Discovery ( (HDVY) ) just unveiled an update.

On December 31, 2025, Health Discovery Corporation filed a patent infringement lawsuit against NVIDIA Corporation in the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware, alleging that NVIDIA’s GPU-accelerated machine-learning stack unlawfully infringed U.S. Patent No. 10,402,685, which covers a recursive feature elimination method using support vector machines to rank and remove less significant data features to improve model accuracy and generalizability. Although the patent expired around June 27, 2025, the company is seeking damages, including potentially trebled damages for alleged willful infringement, for the remaining period allowed under the statute of limitations, introducing legal uncertainty that could affect both Health Discovery’s monetization of its intellectual property and NVIDIA’s exposure to retrospective IP claims in advanced AI hardware and software markets.

More about Health Discovery

Health Discovery Corporation operates in the technology and intellectual property sector, focusing on machine-learning innovations such as methods for feature selection in pattern recognition and classification tasks, including its patented Recursive Feature Elimination Method Using Support Vector Machines.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $420

data.title: EON Resources outlines growth strategy in 2025 shareholder letter
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

EON Resources ( (EONR) ) has issued an update.

In a January 21, 2026 shareholder letter reviewing 2025, EON Resources highlighted a transformative recapitalization completed on September 9, 2025, in which the company secured $45.5 million in funding that retired $20 million of senior institutional debt, settled a $20 million promissory note to the Grayburg-Jackson field seller for $7 million, recovered preferred units previously held by the seller in exchange for 1.5 million common shares, and acquired a 10% overriding royalty interest in its principal GJF asset. This balance sheet restructuring significantly reduced monthly debt service, improved EON’s debt and equity position, and, together with a concurrent farmout of the San Andres formation to Virtus Energy Partners, positioned the company for future growth and potential acquisitions. Under the September 9, 2025 Farmout Agreement, Virtus acquired a 65% working interest and operational control over the San Andres rights in the GJF, paying $5 million in cash plus up to $2 million for workovers and $20 million for a 5% overriding royalty interest on future San Andres production, while EON retained a 35% working interest and a carried interest in the first three horizontal wells. The arrangement is expected to boost EON’s net oil production via no-cost workovers and, once drilling begins in 2026, to generate sufficient cash flow from the initial three wells to fund participation in a potential inventory of up to 92 horizontal locations, allowing EON to concentrate on its Seven Rivers waterflood program while Virtus focuses on horizontal San Andres development, with anticipated production and cash flow impacts beginning in the third quarter of 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (EONR) stock is a Hold with a $0.38 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EON Resources stock, see the EONR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EONR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EONR is a Neutral.

EON Resources’ overall score is driven by strong earnings call performance, offset by financial challenges and valuation concerns. The company’s strategic initiatives and debt reduction are positive, but operational inefficiencies and market valuation issues remain significant risks.

To see Spark’s full report on EONR stock, click here.

More about EON Resources

EON Resources Inc. is an oil and gas company focused on developing its Grayburg-Jackson oil field (GJF) in Eddy County, New Mexico, with a primary emphasis on waterflood operations in the Seven Rivers formation while leveraging partnerships for horizontal drilling in the San Andres formation. The company is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker EONR and its management team, with decades of petroleum and business experience, collectively owns about 10% of the company’s outstanding common shares as of December 2025.

On January 19, 2026, Acorn Energy extended and refined its senior leadership consulting arrangements, entering into a new consulting agreement with President and CEO Jan H. Loeb that maintains his status as a consultant, sets his annualized compensation and additional monthly pay for his concurrent role as Acting CEO of OmniMetrix, and grants him 25,000 stock options vesting through 2028, alongside a one-time cash bonus equal to 5% of his 2025 cash compensation for his role in establishing a technology partnership between OmniMetrix and AIO Systems.
